summary: Code review allows HARBOR-219 through the carrier checkpoint correction head. The product change passes managed identity profile_storage_ref to the local provider as internal protected material, defaults user-owned sessions to visible local windows, preserves persistent profile dirs while cleaning ephemeral dirs, tightens persistent dir permissions, and redacts raw profile storage refs from direct/public identity facts. The follow-up carrier-only change moves the checkpoint from build to merge for PR #239 consumption. This is local contract evidence and does not claim live provider/session/site execution.
